# Merge Descriptors

[![NPM Version][npm-image]][npm-url]
[![NPM Downloads][downloads-image]][downloads-url]
[![Build Status][travis-image]][travis-url]
[![Test Coverage][coveralls-image]][coveralls-url]

Merge objects using descriptors.

```js
var merge = require('merge-descriptors');

var obj = {};
var obj2 = {name: 'tobi'};

merge(obj, obj2);

obj.name;
// => 'tobi'
```

## API

```js
var merge = require('merge-descriptors');
```

### merge(destination, source, [redefine])

Merge the property descriptors from `source` onto `destination`. By default,
properties that already exist on the `destination` are not overridden by values
from `source`. Properties that do not exist on the `destination` are defined.

When `redefine` is `true`, all properties are redefined on the `destination`.
